# CMakeLists.txt — Dear ImGui + GLFW + OpenGL 3 starter (docking branch).
#
# Generated by the imgui-cpp Claude Code skill.
#
# This file fetches Dear ImGui v1.92.7-docking and GLFW 3.4 via FetchContent,
# builds ImGui (core + GLFW backend + OpenGL3 backend) as a static library,
# and links it into a `main` executable that compiles your application code
# with C++23.
#
# Drop-in usage:
#   1. Place this file at your project root (rename to `CMakeLists.txt`).
#   2. Place main.cpp from main_glfw_opengl3.cpp.template at <root>/src/main.cpp.
#   3. Place imscoped.hpp at <root>/src/imscoped.hpp (or anywhere on the include path).
#   4. mkdir build && cd build && cmake .. && cmake --build .

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)
project(imgui_cpp_app
    LANGUAGES CXX
    VERSION 0.1.0
)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)

# Always emit compile_commands.json so clangd / the LSP tool can navigate ImGui.
set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Dependencies via FetchContent (no system packages required)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
include(FetchContent)

# Dear ImGui (docking branch)
FetchContent_Declare(imgui
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/ocornut/imgui.git
    GIT_TAG        v1.92.7-docking
    GIT_SHALLOW    TRUE
)

# GLFW (windowing/input)
FetchContent_Declare(glfw
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/glfw/glfw.git
    GIT_TAG        3.4
    GIT_SHALLOW    TRUE
)
set(GLFW_BUILD_DOCS     OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(GLFW_BUILD_TESTS    OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(GLFW_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)

FetchContent_MakeAvailable(imgui glfw)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# OpenGL — find the system GL implementation. Required for the OpenGL3 backend.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
find_package(OpenGL REQUIRED)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# ImGui as a static library (core + GLFW + OpenGL3 backends)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
add_library(imgui STATIC
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_demo.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_draw.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_tables.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_widgets.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp
)
target_include_directories(imgui SYSTEM PUBLIC
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends
)
target_link_libraries(imgui PUBLIC glfw OpenGL::GL)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Application
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
add_executable(main
    src/main.cpp
)
target_include_directories(main PRIVATE src)  # for imscoped.hpp
target_link_libraries(main PRIVATE imgui)

# Strict warnings (per skill defaults).
if (CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "GNU|Clang|AppleClang")
    target_compile_options(main PRIVATE
        -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wshadow
        -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wold-style-cast -Wcast-align
        -Wunused -Woverloaded-virtual -Wconversion -Wsign-conversion
        -Wnull-dereference -Wdouble-promotion -Wformat=2
    )
elseif (MSVC)
    target_compile_options(main PRIVATE /W4 /permissive-)
endif()

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# (Optional) imgui_test_engine integration — uncomment to enable headless tests.
# See assets/imgui_test_skeleton.cpp.template and references/testing.md.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# FetchContent_Declare(imgui_test_engine
#     GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/ocornut/imgui_test_engine.git
#     GIT_TAG        v1.92.7
#     GIT_SHALLOW    TRUE)
# FetchContent_MakeAvailable(imgui_test_engine)
# add_library(imgui_te STATIC
#     ${imgui_test_engine_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_test_engine/imgui_te_context.cpp
#     ${imgui_test_engine_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_test_engine/imgui_te_coroutine.cpp
#     ${imgui_test_engine_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_test_engine/imgui_te_engine.cpp
#     ${imgui_test_engine_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_test_engine/imgui_te_exporters.cpp
#     ${imgui_test_engine_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_test_engine/imgui_te_perftool.cpp
#     ${imgui_test_engine_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_test_engine/imgui_te_ui.cpp
#     ${imgui_test_engine_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_test_engine/imgui_te_utils.cpp)
# target_include_directories(imgui_te SYSTEM PUBLIC ${imgui_test_engine_SOURCE_DIR})
# target_compile_definitions(imgui PUBLIC IMGUI_ENABLE_TEST_ENGINE)
# target_link_libraries(imgui_te PUBLIC imgui)
